headline: P&L exposure: ₹16,396 Cr direct market cap loss (engine estimate) + ₹11,313.2 Cr additional contingent risk (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.2-0.5x likely; margin erosion of 6,210.3 bps; revenue at risk of -₹2,049.5 Cr (engine estimate).
Cost of capital expected to rise by 20-40 bps as per BRSR/SEBI scrutiny; potential for bond spread widening and FII outflows.

Triggers BRSR, GRI:205 (rationale: Triggered by any fraud disclosure, bribery allegation, insider trading investigation, or ED/CBI action. Also referenced for ISO 37001 certification.), COSO ERM, SEBI; regulatory deadlines for disclosure and remediation; risk of penalties and trading restrictions.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹16,396 Cr direct market cap loss (engine estimate) + ₹11,313.2 Cr additional contingent risk (engine estimate)
